title.simpleText: Kolette - 'Our Love Is Gone' Official Lyric Video

subtitle.simpleText: ‘SAYAW’ is an apt title for up-and-coming singer-dancer KOLETTE’s EP. The tracks consisting most of dance tracks reflect the saying, “life is a dance”— may it be a sad or happy lyrics, it reflects the different beats and steps we encounter in life.

RAIN - 'ligaya' Official Lyric Video 2 minutes, 57 seconds
RAIN - ''miss senti(mental)' Official Lyric Video 3 minutes, 12 seconds
RAIN - 'pahuway' Official Lyric Video 4 minutes, 22 seconds

subtitle.simpleText: ‘b luvd’, is RAIN’s battle cry as she enters the entertainment scene after her well-received PBB stay. It is a vulnerable yet powerful mantra, fitting for a young adult baring her soul through music. The EP contains 5 originals songs with 3/5 written and co-written by RAIN.

subtitle.simpleText: The “’Pag Tinadhana” Album is a full circle moment for the Divine Diva, Zsa Zsa Padilla. After releasing her single with the same title last year and dropping singles one, she is finally releasing her album with 5 new tracks.

channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Star Records, Inc., an ABS-CBN Entertainment Group company, leads the pack among record labels that produce music from the Philippines and distribute original Pilipino music worldwide. 

Subscribe to the Star Music channel!
http://bit.ly/StarMusicChannel
